untranslatable_reason: Signal requires historical analog correlation model (>0.65 correlation to 1929 crash pattern) and macro sentiment shift detection. These require external data sources and machine learning not available in the allowed indicator set. Volume spike condition partially translatable using vol_ratio_20, but the core analog-matching and macro policy triggers cannot be expressed with standard technical indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture the spirit: volume spike (vol_ratio_20 > 1.0 std dev) as trigger, position reversal based on directional returns within 1 day. However, the historical analog correlation threshold and macro statement detection are fundamentally untranslatable without external regime/pattern recognition models. The signal is inherently discretionary and event-driven rather than rules-based.
